news.title: Andrew Yang thinks the next big startup opportunity is lowering the cost of living
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Andrew Yang made a list of everything Americans overpay for — housing, food, wireless — and thinks the next startup gold rush is giving that money back.

news.title: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions of people," the company wrote in a blog post.

news.title: Google Sues China-Based AI Phishing Network
news.description: [NEWSMAX] Google has sued a China-based cybercriminal network, alleging it used the company's artificial intelligence tools to help build phishing software that steals customers' personal and financial information.

news.title: Meta’s months-old AI unit is a soul-crushing gulag, say the engineers stuck inside it

news.title: Chinese cybercrime operation that used AI to scam ‘hundreds of thousands of victims’ sued by Google
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] The tech giant said a group called "Outsider Enterprise" used AI to scam hundreds of thousands of victims, sending 2.5 million text messages over a span of two weeks.

news.title: Mistral is rumored to be raising €3B at €20B valuation
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] The funding round would value the company at around €20 billion (about $23.15 billion), nearly double its Series C valuation of €11.7 billion.
